title: Fix page navigation and update WhatsApp number

requirements.text: Fix multi-page routing so that navigation to About, Services, Book Consultation, Testimonials, and Contact pages works correctly from all navigation links and buttons throughout the site

quotes: no other pages are not working

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking navigation menu links successfully navigates to About, Services, Testimonials, and Contact pages
Clicking 'Book Now' or 'Book Your Destiny Reading' buttons successfully navigates to the booking page
Browser back/forward buttons work correctly with page navigation
All page routes render their respective content without errors

requirements.text: Update WhatsApp button to use phone number 7096912557 instead of 9096912557
acceptanceCriteria: Floating WhatsApp button opens chat with number 7096912557
Footer WhatsApp link directs to number 7096912557
All WhatsApp references throughout the site use 7096912557

requirements.text: Configure booking form to submit data to Google Sheet at https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1cHx7IUpbe1T9QaHAmD2eI6IHLvPPWufnLEo6YbwpoiI/edit?gid=0#gid=0, sending name, email, phone, date, service, and message fields

quotes: when a user make an appointment then it should send the data to this google sheet https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1cHx7IUpbe1T9QaHAmD2eI6IHLvPPWufnLEo6YbwpoiI/edit?gid=0#gid=0

acceptanceCriteria: Booking form submission successfully writes data to the specified Google Sheet
All form fields (name, email, phone, date, service, message) are captured in the sheet
User receives success confirmation after submission
Form data appears in the sheet immediately or within a reasonable time

constraints: Maintain existing cosmic spiritual design theme and styling
Preserve all existing page content and components
nonGoals: Adding new pages beyond the existing six
Changing the design theme or color scheme
Implementing real payment processing (payment placeholder structure remains)
